title: Sophisticated Ping
description:
Sophisticated Ping Wheel for Minecraft. 
Make MC Apex Again!
body:
Sophisticated Ping

Sophisticated Ping Wheel for Minecraft. Make MC Apex Again! ## Ping System Default hotkey: `c` Send signal to your team for communication. Press hotkey again on the Ping Point to cancel it. ## Images A ping from teammate: ![pingFromTeammate](https://github.com/junyudev/sophisticated-ping/raw/1.19.2/images/pingFromTeammate.png) Pings at night: ![pingAtNight](https://github.com/junyudev/sophisticated-ping/raw/1.19.2/images/pingAtNight.png)
